英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Brooke於大約1569年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親Richard Brooke31歲，母親Dorothy25歲。他於大約1590年與Katheryn在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1617年10月在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Brooke于大约1569年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲Richard Brooke31岁，母亲Dorothy25岁。他于大约1590年与Katheryn在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1617年10月在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Brooke was born about 1569, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Brooke, was 31 and his mother, Dorothy, was 25. He married Katheryn about 1590, in Manchester, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in October 1617, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Brooke est né environ 1569, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Brooke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Dorothy, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Katheryn environ 1590, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en octobre 1617, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Brooke um 1569 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Brooke 31 und seine Mutter Dorothy 25. Er hat um 1590 in Manchester, Lancashire, England Katheryn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Oktober 1617 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brooke è nato il circa 1569 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Brooke, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Katheryn circa 1590, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1617, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.Manchester, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスター
イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスター
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Brookeが約1569年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Richard Brookeは31歳，母Dorothyは25歳であった。約1590年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターでKatherynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1617年10月に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Brooke(이)가 대략 1569년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Brooke(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1590년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 Katheryn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1617년 10월 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

Manchester, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Brooke nasceu aproximadamente 1569, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Brooke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Katheryn aproximadamente 1590, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1617, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Brooke родился около 1569 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Brooke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Dorothy, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Katheryn около 1590 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер октябрь 1617 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Brooke nació aproximadamente 1569, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Brooke, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Dorothy, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Katheryn aproximadamente 1590, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1617, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
